description_long: This obelisk is a tall, rectangular column with a slightly flared top and a broad, square base. Its surfaces are adorned with detailed, faded illustrations reminiscent of ancient Egyptian art, depicting human and animal-headed figures in ceremonial poses. The artwork is distributed on all four sides, with each face showing different scenes and characters, some holding staffs or wearing headdresses. The base appears weathered and uneven, with a brownish tone and some visible damage or erosion at the corners. The top of the obelisk is open and slightly indented, lacking the traditional pointed tip, and the overall structure suggests it is made from stone or a similar material. The colors are predominantly earthy, with browns, tans, and muted reds, giving it an aged, historical appearance.
description: A rectangular, ancient Egyptian-style obelisk with faded ceremonial illustrations on all sides and a broad, weathered base. The top is open and indented, and the surface is marked by earthy, aged colors.
description_view_0: This view shows two figures, one with an animal head, in a ceremonial pose on the obelisk's face, with the base appearing slightly damaged on the left.
description_view_1: This side features two figures, both in elaborate headdresses, facing each other with more visible detail in their attire and a less damaged base.
description_view_2: The artwork here is more faded, with two figures, one holding a staff, and the base appears the most worn and discolored.
description_view_3: This face displays a human and an animal-headed figure in profile, with the base showing moderate wear and a clear depiction of the illustrated scene.
attribute_inscription: None visible; only pictorial illustrations are present, with no discernible text or hieroglyphs.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative painted scenes of ancient Egyptian figures and motifs cover all four sides, rendered in a faded, illustrative style.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad, square, and slightly raised, with visible wear, chipping, and a brownish coloration. It appears solid and unadorned except for the weathered texture.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat and open, with a slight outward flare and no pointed or decorative features.
